final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [3:0] load_value,
    output reg [3:0] count);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 4'b0;
    end else if (load) begin
        count <= load_value;
    end else begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end
endmodule
